task_completion.description: The flawed CSV file is replaced with the corrected version while maintaining the original URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the WordPress Media Library, a 'Replace Media' plugin screen, or a file upload screen where the CSV file is being updated with the corrected file (e.g., uploading CORRECTED_Q3_Data.csv or replacing the existing file to keep the same URL).

task_completion.description: The original post 'Q3 2024 Financial Results Announced' is updated with a correction notice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress post editor for 'Q3 2024 Financial Results Announced' showing a new paragraph in the content that contains either the word 'Correction' or 'Editor's Note'.

task_completion.description: A new post titled 'Embargoed: Q3 Corrected Figures Summary' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress post editor or the 'All Posts' list showing a post with the exact title 'Embargoed: Q3 Corrected Figures Summary'.

task_completion.description: The new post is assigned the tag 'Press Release'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tags panel in the WordPress post editor for the new post showing 'Press Release' added as a tag.

task_completion.description: The new post is scheduled to be published tomorrow at 08:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The publish settings in the WordPress post editor showing the post status as 'Scheduled' with the date set to tomorrow and the time set to 08:00 AM.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the WordPress admin panel via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin interface (e.g., wp-admin), rather than terminal commands executing WP-CLI or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the corrected CSV file through the browser interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the browser's file upload dialog or drag-and-drop interface being used in the WordPress media library, rather than terminal commands moving files into the wp-content/uploads directory.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database edits to create or modify posts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing MySQL commands or scripts directly inserting post data into the WordPress database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Original post title: 'Q3 2024 Financial Results Announced'. New post title: 'Embargoed: Q3 Corrected Figures Summary'. Required tag: 'Press Release'. Required correction phrases: 'Correction' or 'Editor's Note'. Target schedule time: 08:00:00. The corrected CSV data contains the value '500000', which may be visible if the agent previews the file.
